errand.en: She ran an errand for her mother.

erupt.en: The volcano could erupt at any time.
erupt.zh: 這座火山隨時可能爆發。

escalator.en: We took the escalator to the second floor.

essence.en: Kindness is the essence of her character.

estate.en: He inherited a large estate from his uncle.
estate.zh: 他從叔叔那裡繼承了一大筆財產。

ethic.en: Hard work is part of his work ethic.
ethic.zh: 努力工作是他職業道德的一部分。

ethical.en: It is not ethical to copy others' work.
ethical.zh: 抄襲別人的作品是不道德的。

evolution.en: We studied the evolution of animals.
evolution.zh: 我們研究了動物的演化。

exaggeration.en: Saying it took forever is an exaggeration.
exaggeration.zh: 說它花了一輩子是誇大其詞。

exceed.en: Do not exceed the speed limit.

exceptional.en: She has exceptional talent in music.
exceptional.zh: 她在音樂上有非凡的天分。

excessive.en: Excessive sugar is bad for you.

exclaim.en: She exclaimed in surprise at the gift.

exclude.en: Please don't exclude anyone from the game.
exclude.zh: 請不要把任何人排除在遊戲之外。

exclusive.en: The club is exclusive to members.
exclusive.zh: 這個俱樂部只對會員開放。

execute.en: The team executed the plan perfectly.
execute.zh: 團隊完美地執行了計畫。

execution.en: The execution of the project was smooth.
execution.zh: 這個專案的執行很順利。

executive.en: She is a busy company executive.
executive.zh: 她是個忙碌的公司主管。

exile.en: The leader lived in exile abroad.

exotic.en: They tried exotic fruits on the trip.
exotic.zh: 他們在旅途中嘗試了異國水果。

expedition.en: The team went on an expedition to the pole.
expedition.zh: 這支隊伍展開了一場前往極地的探險。

expertise.en: We need her expertise to fix the problem.
expertise.zh: 我們需要她的專業知識來解決問題。

exploit.en: We should not exploit natural resources.
exploit.zh: 我們不該過度開發自然資源。

extension.en: She asked for an extension on the report.
extension.zh: 她要求延長報告的繳交期限。

extensive.en: He has extensive knowledge of history.
extensive.zh: 他對歷史有廣博的知識。

exterior.en: The exterior of the house is painted blue.
exterior.zh: 這棟房子的外觀漆成藍色。

extinct.en: Dinosaurs have been extinct for ages.

fabric.en: This soft fabric is good for summer.
fabric.zh: 這種柔軟的布料適合夏天。

fabulous.en: We had a fabulous time at the beach.
fabulous.zh: 我們在海灘玩得超開心。

facilitate.en: A clear plan can facilitate teamwork.
facilitate.zh: 清楚的計畫能促進團隊合作。

faculty.en: The school faculty welcomed the new students.
faculty.zh: 學校全體教職員歡迎新生。

fascinate.en: The story fascinated the whole class.

fatigue.en: After the long hike, he felt great fatigue.
fatigue.zh: 長途健行後他感到非常疲憊。

federal.en: The federal government passed the law.
federal.zh: 聯邦政府通過了這項法律。

fiscal.en: The company reported its fiscal results.

fleet.en: A fleet of ships sailed into the harbor.

flexibility.zh: 瑜珈能增進你的柔軟度。

flip.en: She flipped the pancake in the pan.

fluency.zh: 朗讀能提升你的流暢度。

fluid.en: Drink plenty of fluids when you are sick.

format.en: Save the file in a different format.
format.zh: 把檔案存成不同的格式。

forum.en: She posted a question on an online forum.
forum.zh: 她在網路論壇上發了一個問題。

foster.en: Good teachers foster a love of learning.
foster.zh: 好老師培養對學習的熱愛。

foul.en: The referee called a foul on the player.

fraction.en: Only a fraction of the work is left.
fraction.zh: 只剩下一小部分的工作。

fragment.en: She found a fragment of the broken cup.
fragment.zh: 她找到了破杯子的一個碎片。

framework.en: The plan gives us a clear framework.
framework.zh: 這個計畫給了我們清楚的架構。

franchise.en: He opened a franchise of a coffee shop.
franchise.zh: 他開了一家咖啡店的加盟店。

fraud.en: The man was arrested for fraud.
fraud.zh: 那名男子因詐欺而被捕。

freight.en: The train carried freight across the country.
freight.zh: 火車載著貨物橫越這個國家。

frontier.en: They traveled to the wild frontier.

galaxy.en: Our sun is one star in the galaxy.
galaxy.zh: 我們的太陽是銀河系中的一顆星。

gasp.en: She gasped when she heard the news.
gasp.zh: 聽到那消息她倒抽一口氣。

gathering.en: There was a family gathering at the park.
gathering.zh: 公園裡有一場家庭聚會。

generator.en: The generator kept the lights on.

genetic.en: Eye color is a genetic trait.
genetic.zh: 眼睛的顏色是一種遺傳特徵。

genre.en: Mystery is her favorite genre of book.
genre.zh: 推理是她最喜歡的書籍類型。

glare.en: The glare from the sun hurt my eyes.
glare.zh: 太陽的強光刺痛了我的眼睛。

gloomy.en: The sky was gray and gloomy.

gorgeous.en: The sunset over the sea was gorgeous.

grant.en: The school granted her a scholarship.
grant.zh: 學校頒給她一筆獎學金。

gravity.en: Gravity pulls objects toward the ground.

greed.en: His greed led to his downfall.
greed.zh: 他的貪婪導致了他的失敗。

grieve.en: The family grieved for their lost pet.
grieve.zh: 這家人為失去的寵物悲傷。

grim.en: The future looked grim after the storm.
grim.zh: 暴風雨後前景看來嚴峻。

grip.en: He kept a tight grip on the rope.

gross.en: The company's gross income rose this year.
gross.zh: 公司今年的總收入增加了。

gut.en: It takes guts to speak in front of a crowd.
gut.zh: 在群眾面前說話需要勇氣。

habitat.zh: 污染破壞了動物的棲息地。

haul.en: They hauled the boxes up the stairs.

hazard.en: Wet floors are a slipping hazard.
hazard.zh: 濕的地板有滑倒的危險。

heir.en: The prince is the heir to the throne.

hence.en: He was late; hence, he missed the bus.
hence.zh: 他遲到了，因此錯過了公車。

herb.en: She grows herbs in her garden.

heritage.en: The old castle is part of our heritage.
heritage.zh: 這座古堡是我們文化遺產的一部分。

highlight.en: Let me highlight the main points.

hockey.en: They play ice hockey in winter.
hockey.zh: 他們冬天打冰上曲棍球。

honorable.en: Helping the weak is an honorable act.
honorable.zh: 幫助弱者是高尚的行為。

horizontal.en: Draw a horizontal line across the page.
horizontal.zh: 在頁面上畫一條水平線。

hormone.zh: 荷爾蒙會影響我們的成長。

hostage.en: The robbers held two people hostage.

hostile.en: The dog seemed hostile to strangers.
hostile.zh: 這隻狗對陌生人似乎有敵意。

hostility.en: There was hostility between the two groups.
hostility.zh: 這兩個團體之間有敵意。

housing.en: The city needs more affordable housing.
housing.zh: 這座城市需要更多平價住宅。

howl.en: The wolf let out a long howl.

hypothesis.zh: 這個實驗檢驗了她的假設。

icon.en: Tap the icon to open the app.
icon.zh: 點圖示來打開應用程式。

ideology.en: The two parties have different ideologies.
ideology.zh: 這兩個政黨有不同的意識形態。

idiot.en: I felt like an idiot for forgetting her name.
idiot.zh: 忘了她的名字讓我覺得自己很傻。

illusion.en: The mirror created an illusion of space.
illusion.zh: 鏡子製造出空間變大的錯覺。

immense.en: The project took an immense amount of work.
immense.zh: 這個專案花了極大量的工作。

immune.en: A healthy diet keeps your immune system strong.
immune.zh: 健康的飲食讓你的免疫系統強健。

implement.en: The school will implement the new rule.
implement.zh: 學校將實施這項新規定。

implication.en: Consider the implications of your choice.
implication.zh: 考慮一下你選擇的後果。

impulse.en: She bought the dress on impulse.
impulse.zh: 她一時衝動買了那件洋裝。

incentive.en: A prize is a good incentive to study.

incorporate.en: We incorporated her ideas into the plan.
incorporate.zh: 我們把她的點子納入計畫。

index.en: Use the index to find the topic.

indifferent.en: He was indifferent to the result.

indigenous.en: We learned about indigenous people of the island.
indigenous.zh: 我們學習了這座島的原住民。

indispensable.zh: 水對生命是不可或缺的。

indulge.en: She indulged in a slice of cake.
indulge.zh: 她放縱地吃了一塊蛋糕。

inevitable.zh: 改變在人生中是不可避免的。

infect.en: The virus can infect many people.
infect.zh: 這種病毒可能感染許多人。

infinite.zh: 太空似乎幾乎是無限的。

infrastructure.en: Roads and bridges are part of infrastructure.
infrastructure.zh: 道路和橋樑是基礎建設的一部分。

inherent.zh: 好奇心是孩子與生俱來的。

inherit.en: She inherited her mother's blue eyes.
inherit.zh: 她遺傳了媽媽的藍眼睛。

initiate.en: They initiated a project to help the poor.
initiate.zh: 他們發起了一項幫助窮人的計畫。

initiative.en: She showed initiative by starting early.
initiative.zh: 她提早開始，展現了主動性。

injection.en: He got an injection at the clinic.

inning.en: Our team scored in the last inning.
inning.zh: 我們隊在最後一局得分。

innovation.en: The phone is full of clever innovation.
innovation.zh: 這支手機充滿巧妙的創新。

innovative.en: She found an innovative way to recycle.
innovative.zh: 她想出了一個創新的回收方法。

inquiry.en: They made an inquiry about the cost.

insane.en: Driving so fast is simply insane.

insight.en: The book gave me insight into history.
insight.zh: 這本書讓我對歷史有了深入的了解。

installation.en: The installation of the software took time.
installation.zh: 安裝這個軟體花了一些時間。

institute.en: She works at a research institute.
institute.zh: 她在一家研究機構工作。

institution.en: The school is a respected institution.
institution.zh: 這所學校是個受人尊敬的機構。

integrate.en: They integrated the new students into the class.

integration.en: The integration of the two teams went well.
integration.zh: 這兩個團隊的整合很順利。

integrity.en: People trust her for her integrity.
integrity.zh: 人們因她的正直而信任她。

intent.en: His intent was to help, not to harm.
intent.zh: 他的意圖是幫忙，不是傷害。

interference.en: There was interference on the radio.

interior.en: The interior of the car is clean.

interpretation.en: Her interpretation of the poem was unique.
interpretation.zh: 她對這首詩的詮釋很獨特。

interval.en: There was a short interval between songs.
interval.zh: 歌與歌之間有短暫的間隔。

intervention.en: The doctor's quick intervention saved him.
intervention.zh: 醫生及時的介入救了他。

irony.en: The irony is that he hates the job he chose.
irony.zh: 諷刺的是，他討厭自己選的工作。

journalist.en: The journalist wrote about the flood.

judicial.en: The judicial system protects our rights.
judicial.zh: 司法制度保護我們的權利。

jug.en: She filled the jug with cold water.

jury.en: The jury found the man not guilty.
jury.zh: 陪審團判定那名男子無罪。

justify.zh: 沒有什麼能為作弊辯解。

juvenile.en: The book is written for a juvenile audience.
juvenile.zh: 這本書是為青少年讀者寫的。

kidnap.en: In the story, robbers kidnap the prince.
kidnap.zh: 在故事裡，盜賊綁架了王子。

landlord.en: The landlord fixed the broken window.
landlord.zh: 房東修好了破掉的窗戶。

laser.en: The doctor used a laser in the operation.
laser.zh: 醫生在手術中使用了雷射。

lawmaker.zh: 立法者辯論這項新法案。

lawsuit.en: The company faced a costly lawsuit.
lawsuit.zh: 這家公司面臨一場昂貴的訴訟。

layer.en: There is a thin layer of dust on the shelf.
layer.zh: 架子上有一層薄薄的灰塵。

league.en: Our team plays in the local league.
league.zh: 我們隊在地方聯盟裡比賽。

legacy.en: His kindness left a lasting legacy.
legacy.zh: 他的善良留下了長久的影響。

legendary.en: He is a legendary basketball player.

legislative.en: The legislative body passed the law.
legislative.zh: 立法機構通過了這項法律。

legitimate.en: She had a legitimate reason for being late.

lest.en: Write it down lest you forget.
lest.zh: 把它寫下來，免得你忘記。

liability.en: The old car became a liability.

likelihood.en: There is a high likelihood of rain.
